content.text:
Recent top and latest X posts matching your query on Vercel Desktop, desktop AI apps/agents, or local AI tools (English language, focused on recent activity around Feb 1-5, 2026). No direct "Vercel Desktop" app exists, but Vercel recently launched **Sandbox**, a CLI/API for giving AI agents a full virtual computer environment (with browser automation, deployments, etc.)—now powering tools like Blackbox AI and v0.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2017423825152184772)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2018686859728089400)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2018021558829408679)

### Key Highlights & Emerging Desktop/Local AI Tools:
- **OpenAI Codex App**: New macOS desktop app for multi-agent coding with parallel agents, worktrees, Figma/Linear/Vercel integrations, and background automations.[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2018617195992134002)
- **UI-TARS (ByteDance/China)**: Fully offline, open-source desktop AI agent that controls any app, browses sites, automates workflows—no cloud/API needed. Runs locally on your laptop.[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2018801244924461258)[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2018948852804678010)
- **LOOI**: Desktop AI robot that animates/interacts with your smartphone apps via local AI.[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2019023162260787224)
- **Shinkai Local AI Agents**: Local-first desktop agents with tools, memory, missions/points system, decentralized identity/payments. Web-based tasks too.[[8]](https://x.com/i/status/2019184219726164122)[[9]](https://x.com/i/status/2019164831736287509)[[10]](https://x.com/i/status/2018338669120413776)
- **Locally AI (iOS/Mac)**: Offline app running Llama/Gemma/MLX models on-device (iPhone/iPad/Mac). No login/data collection. Now supports LFM 2.5 for reasoning/vision.[[11]](https://x.com/i/status/2018401390574367030)
- **ElastOS World Computer v1**: Personal cloud on your machine with local AI, sovereign storage/identity/networking. Open-source, DAO-funded.[[12]](https://x.com/i/status/2019170679929573757)[[13]](https://x.com/i/status/2019071428184641568)
- **Other mentions**: Native Swift local AI on iPhone (Whisper for translation, airplane mode/privacy-focused),[[14]](https://x.com/i/status/2018639727704891795) Qwen 3 Coder for local coding agents,[[15]](https://x.com/i/status/2019068159408377913) OpenClaw on Raspberry Pi for local agents.[[16]](https://x.com/i/status/2018282583218335833)

Trend: Heavy focus on **local/offline AI agents** to avoid cloud costs/privacy issues, with open-source momentum from China/US devs. Vercel excels in agent infra (Sandbox/Skills/CLI) but cloud-hybrid.[[17]](https://x.com/i/status/2018352042889408733) Many integrate with Vercel for deploys.[[18]](https://x.com/i/status/2018063728093073821) For videos/images, I can dive deeper if you share specific URLs/IDs. What aspect interests you most?
